# JavaScript Event Loop Trainer

> A free, interactive JavaScript Event Loop trainer available in Russian and English.

## Purpose

Practice predicting the order of `console.log` output and learn how the JavaScript runtime processes synchronous code, the microtask queue, and the task (macrotask) queue.

## Topics

- Synchronous JavaScript execution and the call stack
- `Promise.then()` and `Promise.finally()`
- `queueMicrotask()`
- `setTimeout()`
- `async` / `await`
- Nested callbacks and the order in which queues are drained

## How it works

The trainer generates exercises at Easy, Medium, and Hard difficulty levels. A learner selects the expected output order, checks the answer, and can review a textual explanation plus a step-by-step visualization of the call stack, microtask queue, task queue, and console.

## Access

- App (Russian): https://eventloop.lol/
- App (English): https://eventloop.lol/en/
- Source repository: https://github.com/nprvsh/EventLoopTrainer

The application is free to use and does not require an account.
